name: claude-report
description: Automatic dev status updates from Claude Code to Slack. Gives managers real-time visibility without interrupting developers.

slack_bot_token.title: Slack Bot Token
slack_bot_token.description: Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...). Create a Slack app with chat:write, channels:history, channels:read, users:read scopes.

slack_channel.title: Slack Channel ID
slack_channel.description: Slack channel ID to post updates (e.g., C0AS7LC0X9B). Find it in channel details.

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: Your name as shown in Slack status posts (e.g., Yuya Morita)
